title: bridge-jmap: silently drops emails that fail to deserialize
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs:255: `.filter_map(|v| serde_json::from_value::<EmailObject>(v.clone()).ok())` silently discards emails that fail to parse. If the JMAP server returns an email with a changed schema, messages are lost with no log entry and no operator alert. Fix: replace `.ok()` with an explicit match that logs a warning including the email ID and raw JSON when deserialization fails, then continues.
